name: Be Ye Transformed
description: Short and easy-to-digest sermons to help listeners not conform to the pattern and system of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of the mind.

episodes.title: The Renewing of the Mind
episodes.description: A short sermon on becoming transformed instead of patterned by the systems around us.

episodes.title: What We Choose To Believe
episodes.description: A reflective episode on belief, certainty, doubt, and the quiet stakes of worldview.

episodes.title: Identity Before Activity
episodes.description: A short teaching on identity, purpose, and learning to move from a renewed inner life.
